format.h(3) Library Functions Manual format.h(3)

NAME

format.h

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct log_format_spec_t
A single parsed format specifier. struct log_template_t
Compiled log format ready for use in log_template_apply().

Enumerations


enum log_template_type_t { LOG_FORMAT_LITERAL, LOG_FORMAT_TIME, LOG_FORMAT_LEVEL, LOG_FORMAT_LEVEL_ALIGNED, LOG_FORMAT_FILE, LOG_FORMAT_FILE_RELATIVE, LOG_FORMAT_LINE, LOG_FORMAT_FUNC, LOG_FORMAT_TID, LOG_FORMAT_TNAME, LOG_FORMAT_MESSAGE, LOG_FORMAT_COLORLOG_LEVEL, LOG_FORMAT_COLOR, LOG_FORMAT_COLORED_MESSAGE, LOG_FORMAT_MICROSECONDS, LOG_FORMAT_NANOSECONDS, LOG_FORMAT_STRFTIME_CODE, LOG_FORMAT_NEWLINE }
Types of format specifiers that can appear in a format string.

Functions


log_template_t * log_template_parse (const char *format_str, bool console_only)
Parse a format string into compiled format structure. void log_template_free (log_template_t *format)
Free compiled format structure. int log_template_apply (const log_template_t *format, char *buf, size_t buf_size, log_level_t level, const char *timestamp, const char *file, int line, const char *func, uint64_t tid, const char *message, bool use_colors, uint64_t time_nanoseconds)
Apply format to a log entry and write result to buffer.

Enumeration Type Documentation

enum log_template_type_t

Types of format specifiers that can appear in a format string.

Enumerator

LOG_FORMAT_TIME

Definition at line 25 of file log/format.h.

25              {
26   LOG_FORMAT_LITERAL,         /* Plain text (no % prefix) */
27   LOG_FORMAT_TIME,            /* %time(fmt) - custom time format */
28   LOG_FORMAT_LEVEL,           /* %level - log level as string */
29   LOG_FORMAT_LEVEL_ALIGNED,   /* %level_aligned - log level padded */
30   LOG_FORMAT_FILE,            /* %file - file path */
31   LOG_FORMAT_FILE_RELATIVE,   /* %file_relative - file path relative to project root */
32   LOG_FORMAT_LINE,            /* %line - line number */
33   LOG_FORMAT_FUNC,            /* %func - function name */
34   LOG_FORMAT_TID,             /* %tid - thread ID */
35   LOG_FORMAT_TNAME,           /* %tname - thread name (from debug registry) */
36   LOG_FORMAT_MESSAGE,         /* %message - log message */
37   LOG_FORMAT_COLORLOG_LEVEL,  /* %colorlog_level_string_to_color - color code */
38   LOG_FORMAT_COLOR,           /* %color(LEVEL, content) - colorize content using LEVEL's color */
39   LOG_FORMAT_COLORED_MESSAGE, /* %colored_message - message with things like filenames and 0x numbers colored */
40   LOG_FORMAT_MICROSECONDS,    /* %ms - microseconds component of current time (000000-999999) */
41   LOG_FORMAT_NANOSECONDS,     /* %ns - nanoseconds component of current time (000000000-999999999) */
42   LOG_FORMAT_STRFTIME_CODE,   /* %H, %M, %S, %A, %B, etc. - strftime format codes */
43   LOG_FORMAT_NEWLINE,         /* Platform-aware newline (\n) */
44 } log_template_type_t;
